case_title: FRIEDLANDER, JOAN VS C & C OF SF: MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,640.70 FILED BY FRIEDLANDER, JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT C & C OF SF: MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
